L Cbit MK Kid 2.5mg/4mg Tablet is effective in treating allergic skin conditions with inflammation and itching. It reduces the actions of chemicals in the body that cause inflammation of the skin. When used correctly it is a safe and effective treatment. It reduces the redness, rash, pain or itchiness caused by your skin’s reaction to an irritant. It thus improves your self-esteem and confidence as your appearance changes. Keep taking it for as long as it is prescribed to get the full benefits.
In Treatment of Sneezing and runny nose due to allergies
L Cbit MK Kid 2.5mg/4mg Tablet is a combination medicine that provides relief from symptoms such as blocked or runny nose, sneezing and itchy or watery eyes. This will make it easier for you to go about your daily activities. It rarely has any serious side effects and you may only need to take it on days you have symptoms. If you are taking it to prevent getting symptoms you should use it regularly to get the most benefit.
In Treatment of Hay fever
Hay fever, also called allergic rhinitis, causes cold-like signs and symptoms, such as a runny nose, itchy eyes, congestion, sneezing and sinus pressure. The only difference is that in hay fever, these symptoms are not produced due to a virus but are simply allergic responses of our body to allergens (allergy causing agents such as pollen). L Cbit MK Kid 2.5mg/4mg Tablet is used to provide relief from these symptoms of hay fever. It works by blocking the release of the chemical substance responsible for producing such allergy symptoms. L Cbit MK Kid 2.5mg/4mg Tablet is a safe medicine which helps treat hay fever and makes us feel at ease.

faqs:
My child has a persistent cough along with allergic symptoms. Can I give cough and allergy medicine together?
No. Do not mix cough and allergy medicines because they usually both contain similar ingredients. This may result in double dosing of the active ingredients, thereby causing serious side effects.
Can I decrease the dose of L Cbit MK Kid 2.5mg/4mg Tablet by myself if my child starts to feel better?
No, adhere to the dose as prescribed by your child’s doctor. Do not increase or decrease the dose by yourself as it can impact your child’s health. While increasing the dose may cause unwanted effects like sedation and depression, decreasing the dose or stopping it suddenly can result in rebound reversal of all symptoms.
How should L Cbit MK Kid 2.5mg/4mg Tablet be stored?
L Cbit MK Kid 2.5mg/4mg Tablet should be stored at room temperature in a dry place, away from direct heat and light. Also, keep all medicines out of the reach and sight of children to avoid any accidental intake.
Can L Cbit MK Kid 2.5mg/4mg Tablet make my child sleepy?
L Cbit MK Kid 2.5mg/4mg Tablet causes mild drowsiness which can make your child sleepy. However, never give this medicine to your child to induce sleep. Forced sleep could mask any underlying sleep disorder like insomnia.
My child is an athlete and has to participate in a sports event in the next two days. Can I start the course of L Cbit MK Kid 2.5mg/4mg Tablet?
No, don’t start L Cbit MK Kid 2.5mg/4mg Tablet without speaking to your child’s doctor. Moreover, L Cbit MK Kid 2.5mg/4mg Tablet can hamper your child’s performance as it may cause mild sedation, dizziness, and sleepiness. So, it’s best to reach out to the doctor first.
Can I stop the medicine by myself?
No, all symptoms may reappear on sudden withdrawal of L Cbit MK Kid 2.5mg/4mg Tablet usually if taken for a long-term. It is advised to stop this medicine gradually under the guidance of your child’s doctor.
My child is suffering from a mood disorder. Is it safe to give L Cbit MK Kid 2.5mg/4mg Tablet to my child?
Some studies show that L Cbit MK Kid 2.5mg/4mg Tablet can cause mood disorders, hallucinations, depression, anxiety, suicidal thoughts, shakiness, and trouble controlling body movements. Therefore, consult your child’s doctor before giving any medicine to your child.
Can I use L Cbit MK Kid 2.5mg/4mg Tablet for treating acute asthma attacks in my child?
L Cbit MK Kid 2.5mg/4mg Tablet should only be used to prevent asthma attacks. It should not be used to stop an attack that has already started. Use your child’s reliever medicine to help with an attack that has already started.

title: L Cbit Tablet
uses:
L Cbit Tablet can be taken with or without food. The dose required by you may vary depending on what you are taking it for. This medicine is usually taken in the evening, but follow the advice of your doctor on how to take it. You may need this medicine only on days you have symptoms, but if you are taking it to prevent the symptoms then you should take it regularly. If you miss doses or stop taking it earlier than advised, your symptoms may come back.
Common side effects include somnolence (sleepiness), dry mouth, fatigue, fever, cough, nasopharyngitis, and nosebleed. These are usually mild and go away after a couple of days as your body adjusts to it. Consult your doctor if any of the side effects persist or worry you.
Before taking it, tell your doctor if you have any kidney problems or epilepsy (seizures). Your dose may need to be modified or this medicine may not suit you. Some other medicines can interact with this medicine so let your healthcare team know what else you are taking. You should also talk to your doctor before using this medicine if you are pregnant or breastfeeding, although it is not thought to be harmful.
benefits:
In Treatment of Allergic conditions
L Cbit Tablet provides relief from symptoms such as blocked or runny nose, sneezing, and itchy or watery eyes. This will make it easier for you to go about your daily activities. It can also give relief from allergic reactions after insect bites and symptoms of hives and eczema such as rash, swelling, itching, and irritation.  This will improve the appearance of your skin and you may find that your mood and self-confidence improve as well. It rarely has any serious side effects and you may only need to take it on days you have symptoms. Moreover, L Cbit Tablet may make you feel less sleepy as compared to other antihistamine medicines. If you are taking it to prevent getting symptoms you should use it regularly to get the most benefit.
sideEffects:
Most side effects do not require any medical attention and disappear as your body adjusts to the medicine. Consult your doctor if they persist or if you’re worried about them

faqs:
Is L Cbit Tablet a steroid? What is it used for?
No, L Cbit Tablet is not a steroid. It is an anti-allergic medication which is used to relieve the symptoms of allergy. It relieves runny nose, sneezing and redness, itching and watering of the eyes caused by hay fever or seasonal allergies. It also relieves similar symptoms caused due to allergies to substances, such as dust mites, animal dander and mold. Additionally, it is helpful in treating symptoms of hives, including itching and rash.
Does L Cbit Tablet make you tired and drowsy?
Yes, L Cbit Tablet can make you feel tired, sleepy and weak. If you have these symptoms, avoid driving or operating heavy machinery. Consult your doctor if not sure.
How long does it take for L Cbit Tablet to work?
L Cbit Tablet starts working and showing improvement within an hour of taking it. However, it may take a little longer to notice the full benefits.
Can I take L Cbit Tablet and Fexofenadine together?
Sometimes the doctor may advise you to take two different antihistamines together if you are being treated for a severe itchy rash. If you are taking L Cbit Tablet during the daytime, your doctor may prescribe another antihistamine for the night which causes sleepiness, especially if the itch makes it difficult for you to sleep.
Is it safe to take L Cbit Tablet for a long time?
L Cbit Tablet is safe if used as prescribed by your doctor. Moreover, it is unlikely to harm you if you take it for a long time. But, it is best to take L Cbit Tablet for only as long as you need it.
For how long should I continue L Cbit Tablet?
The duration for which the medicine needs to be taken depends on the problem being treated. For instance, if you are taking it for an insect bite, you may need it for a day or two. While, if you are taking it to prevent symptoms of chronic allergic rhinitis (inflammation of nose) or chronic urticaria, you may need to take L Cbit Tablet for a longer time. Talk to your doctor if you are unsure about the duration of using L Cbit Tablet

expertAdvice:
Your doctor has prescribed L Cbit Tablet to help relieve allergy symptoms such as itching, swelling, and rashes.
As compared to other similar medications, it is much less likely to make you feel sleepy.
Be cautious while driving or doing anything that requires concentration as it can cause dizziness and sleepiness.
Do not drink alcohol while taking this medication as it may cause increased sleepiness.
Stop taking L Cbit Tablet at least three days before taking an allergy test as it can affect the test results.
missedDose: If you miss a dose of L Cbit Tablet, take it as soon as possible. However, if it is almost time for your next dose, skip the missed dose and go back to your regular schedule. Do not double the dose.

title: L Cef CL Dry Syrup
uses:
Treatment of Bacterial infections
Benefits of L Cef CL Dry Syrup
In Treatment of Bacterial infections
L Cef CL Dry Syrup helps treat infections that are caused by bacteria. It contains two medicines, Cefixime, and Clavulanic acid. Cefixime stops the growth of infection-causing bacteria. Clavulanic Acid enhances the activity of Cefixime against the bacteria as well as reduces resistance of the bacteria to the antibiotic. This medicine usually makes you feel better within a few days, but you should continue taking it as prescribed even when you feel better to make sure that all the infectious bacteria are killed and do not become resistant.
benefits:

This medicine usually makes you feel better within a few days, but you should continue taking it as prescribed even when you feel better to make sure that all the infectious bacteria are killed and do not become resistant.
sideEffects:
Most side effects do not require any medical attention and disappear as your body adjusts to the medicine. Consult your doctor if they persist or if you’re worried about them
Common side effects of L Cef CL
Nausea
Diarrhea
Stomach pain
Indigestion
Flatulence
Bloating
howToUse:
Take this medication by mouth, with or without food as directed by your doctor, usually once a day. If you are consuming chewable tablets, chew thoroughly and then swallow. Complete the full course of this medicine, even if symptoms disappear after a few days.
Is the use of L Cef CL Dry Syrup contraindicated in patients with impaired renal function?
L Cef CL Dry Syrup should be used with particular care in patients with severely impaired renal function. Dose modification is advised for patients with moderate or severe renal impairment.
What are the precautions that need to be taken while taking L Cef CL Dry Syrup?
The dose of L Cef CL Dry Syrup should be adjusted in patients with impairment of kidneys and for those who have gastrointestinal disease or colitis.
What are the serious side effects associated with the use of L Cef CL Dry Syrup?
The use of L Cef CL Dry Syrup can also lead to serious side effects like severe stomach/abdominal pain, persistent nausea/vomiting, unusual tiredness, new signs of infection (e.g., persistent sore throat, fever), yellowing of eyes/skin, dark urine, easy bruising/bleeding, signs of kidney problems (such as change in the amount of urine) and mental/mood changes (such as confusion).
What all should I tell my doctor before starting the course of this medicine?
Please inform your doctor if you are pregnant or trying for a baby or breastfeeding before you start taking this medicine. Let your doctor know if you are using any other medicine.
Can the use of L Cef CL Dry Syrup cause diarrhea?
Yes, the use of L Cef CL Dry Syrup can cause diarrhea. It is an antibiotic which kills the harmful bacteria. However, it also affects the helpful bacteria in your stomach or intestine and causes diarrhea. If you are experiencing severe diarrhea, talk to your doctor about it.
How long does L Cef CL Dry Syrup takes to work?
Usually, L Cef CL Dry Syrup starts working soon after taking it. However, it may take some days to kill all the harmful bacteria and make you feel better.
What if I don't get better after using L Cef CL Dry Syrup?
Inform your doctor if you don't feel better after finishing the full course of treatment. Also, inform him if your symptoms are getting worse while using this medicine.
Can I stop taking L Cef CL Dry Syrup when I feel better?
No, do not stop taking L Cef CL Dry Syrup and complete the full course of treatment even if you feel better. Your symptoms may improve before the infection is completely cured.
What are the instructions for storage and disposal of L Cef CL Dry Syrup?
Keep this medicine in the container or the pack it came in, tightly closed. Store it according to the instructions mentioned on the pack or label. Dispose of the unused medicine. Make sure it is not consumed by pets, children and other people.

title: L Cef O Dry Syrup
uses:
Give L Cef O Dry Syrup to your child orally, preferably at a fixed time, either before or after meals. In case your child develops a stomach upset, prefer giving it with meals. The dose and duration depend upon the type and severity of the infection, your child’s age, and body weight, so stick to the dose, time, and way prescribed by the doctor. If your child vomits within 30 minutes of intake, repeat the same dose but do not double dose if it's time for the next dose.
Do not give this medicine to your child in case of cold and flu symptoms. Such symptoms are almost always a result of viral infections, and antibiotics are ineffective in killing viruses. Antibiotics are given in cough and flu symptoms only when the doctor detects any underlying secondary bacterial infection.
This medicine may have some minor and temporary side effects such as vomiting, diarrhea, nausea, abdominal pain, and allergy. These side effects will disappear once your child’s body adapts to the medicine. However, if they persist or become bothersome for your child, report to the doctor without any delay.
Share your child’s complete medical history with your child’s doctor. Make sure the doctor knows if your child has or had any previous episode of allergy, heart problem, a blood disorder, birth defects, airway obstruction, lung anomaly, gastrointestinal problem, skin disorder, liver impairment, and kidney malfunction. This information is critical for dose alterations and for planning your child’s overall treatment.
benefits:
In Treatment of Typhoid fever
Typhoid fever spreads through the intake of contaminated food and water. Children who have typhoid and do not require hospital admission can be well managed with L Cef O Dry Syrup at home because of its excellent activity against organisms that cause typhoid fever.
In Treatment of Bacterial infections
L Cef O Dry Syrup is a combination of two different antibiotics that work together, in different ways, to treat various bacterial infections. Cefixime works by stopping the growth of bacteria and kills them. Ofloxacin prevents multiplication and repair of infection causing bacteria and prevents further spread of the infection.
This combination medicine can be used to treat many different bacterial infections such as ear, sinus, throat, lung, urinary tract, skin and soft tissues. It usually makes you feel better within a few days, but you should continue taking it as prescribed even when you feel better to make sure that all bacteria are killed and do not become resistant.

sideEffects:
L Cef O Dry Syrup does not pose serious side effects and is well-tolerated by children. In case the side effects do occur, they’re likely to subside once the body adapts to the medicine. Consult your child’s doctor if these side effects persist or bother your child. The most common side effects include-

Loss of appetite
Allergy

However, consult with your child’s doctor before giving L Cef O Dry Syrup to your child in case of a severe form of liver disease.
faqs:
What if I give too much of L Cef O Dry Syrup by mistake?
An extra dose of L Cef O Dry Syrup is unlikely to do harm. However, you must still be vigilant because overdoses may cause unwanted side effects and may even worsen your child’s condition. If you think you have given too much of L Cef O Dry Syrup to your child, speak to a doctor immediately.
Are there any possible serious side effects of L Cef O Dry Syrup?
Some serious side effects of this medicine include persistent vomiting, kidney damage, allergy, diarrhea, and severe gastrointestinal infections. Always consult your child’s doctor for help in such a situation.
Can other medicines be given at the same time as L Cef O Dry Syrup?
L Cef O Dry Syrup can sometimes interact with other medicines or substances. Tell your doctor about any other medicines your child is taking before starting L Cef O Dry Syrup. Also, check with your child’s doctor before giving any medicine to your child.
Can I get my child vaccinated while on treatment with L Cef O Dry Syrup?
Antibiotics usually do not interfere with the ingredients in vaccines or cause a bad reaction in a child who has just been vaccinated. However, children taking antibiotics should not get vaccinated until they recover from the illness. As soon as your child feels better, the vaccine can be given.
Can L Cef O Dry Syrup impact my child’s digestion?
Children often have a sensitive stomach and develop a stomach upset while taking antibiotics. When antibiotics are given, the medicine may kill off the good bacteria along with the bad ones, increasing the risk of developing other infections. In case your child is having diarrhea while on L Cef O Dry Syrup, do not stop the medicine course. Instead, call your child’s doctor to ask about the next steps. In some cases, the doctor may alter the dose.
Can L Cef O Dry Syrup lead to bacterial resistance in my child?
Yes, the infection-causing bacteria can become resistant to L Cef O Dry Syrup because of irregular dosing, unrequired repeated use, and misuse of L Cef O Dry Syrup can lead to resistance. Resistant bacteria are no longer killed by the antibiotics and may lead to reinfection.
What should I tell the doctor before giving L Cef O Dry Syrup to my child?
Inform the doctor if your child is suffering from heart disease, genetic disorders involving blood vessels, seizures, psychiatric disorders, diabetes, photoallergy (allergy from sunlight), neuromuscular disorders, or rheumatoid arthritis. This is because there is a possibility that L Cef O Dry Syrup may aggravate these conditions and result in complications.

title: L Cek 5mg Tablet
uses:
L Cek 5mg Tablet can be taken with or without food. The dose required by you may vary depending on what you are taking it for. This medicine is usually taken in the evening, but follow the advice of your doctor on how to take it. You may need this medicine only on days you have symptoms, but if you are taking it to prevent the symptoms then you should take it regularly. If you miss doses or stop taking it earlier than advised, your symptoms may come back.
Common side effects include somnolence (sleepiness), dry mouth, fatigue, fever, cough, nasopharyngitis, and nosebleed. These are usually mild and go away after a couple of days as your body adjusts to it. Consult your doctor if any of the side effects persist or worry you.
Before taking it, tell your doctor if you have any kidney problems or epilepsy (seizures). Your dose may need to be modified or this medicine may not suit you. Some other medicines can interact with this medicine so let your healthcare team know what else you are taking. You should also talk to your doctor before using this medicine if you are pregnant or breastfeeding, although it is not thought to be harmful.
benefits:
In Treatment of Allergic conditions
L Cek 5mg Tablet provides relief from symptoms such as blocked or runny nose, sneezing, and itchy or watery eyes. This will make it easier for you to go about your daily activities. It can also give relief from allergic reactions after insect bites and symptoms of hives and eczema such as rash, swelling, itching, and irritation.  This will improve the appearance of your skin and you may find that your mood and self-confidence improve as well. It rarely has any serious side effects and you may only need to take it on days you have symptoms. Moreover, L Cek 5mg Tablet may make you feel less sleepy as compared to other antihistamine medicines. If you are taking it to prevent getting symptoms you should use it regularly to get the most benefit.
sideEffects:
Most side effects do not require any medical attention and disappear as your body adjusts to the medicine. Consult your doctor if they persist or if you’re worried about them

faqs:
Is L Cek 5mg Tablet a steroid? What is it used for?
No, L Cek 5mg Tablet is not a steroid. It is an anti-allergic medication which is used to relieve the symptoms of allergy. It relieves runny nose, sneezing and redness, itching and watering of the eyes caused by hay fever or seasonal allergies. It also relieves similar symptoms caused due to allergies to substances, such as dust mites, animal dander and mold. Additionally, it is helpful in treating symptoms of hives, including itching and rash.
Does L Cek 5mg Tablet make you tired and drowsy?
Yes, L Cek 5mg Tablet can make you feel tired, sleepy and weak. If you have these symptoms, avoid driving or operating heavy machinery. Consult your doctor if not sure.
How long does it take for L Cek 5mg Tablet to work?
L Cek 5mg Tablet starts working and showing improvement within an hour of taking it. However, it may take a little longer to notice the full benefits.
Can I take L Cek 5mg Tablet and Fexofenadine together?
Sometimes the doctor may advise you to take two different antihistamines together if you are being treated for a severe itchy rash. If you are taking L Cek 5mg Tablet during the daytime, your doctor may prescribe another antihistamine for the night which causes sleepiness, especially if the itch makes it difficult for you to sleep.
Is it safe to take L Cek 5mg Tablet for a long time?
L Cek 5mg Tablet is safe if used as prescribed by your doctor. Moreover, it is unlikely to harm you if you take it for a long time. But, it is best to take L Cek 5mg Tablet for only as long as you need it.
For how long should I continue L Cek 5mg Tablet?
The duration for which the medicine needs to be taken depends on the problem being treated. For instance, if you are taking it for an insect bite, you may need it for a day or two. While, if you are taking it to prevent symptoms of chronic allergic rhinitis (inflammation of nose) or chronic urticaria, you may need to take L Cek 5mg Tablet for a longer time. Talk to your doctor if you are unsure about the duration of using L Cek 5mg Tablet

title: L Centrizon AM 5mg/75mg Tablet
uses:
L Centrizon AM 5mg/75mg Tablet is taken with or without food in a dose and duration as advised by the doctor. The dose you are given will depend on your condition and how you respond to the medicine. You should keep taking this medicine for as long as your doctor recommends. If you stop treatment too early your symptoms may come back and your condition may worsen. Let your doctor know about all other medications you are taking as some may affect, or be affected by this medicine.
The most common side effects are stomach upset, dryness in mouth, headache, fatigue, and allergic reaction. Most of these are temporary and usually resolve with time. Contact your doctor straight away if you are at all concerned about any of these side effects. This medicine can also cause dizziness and sleepiness, so do not drive or do anything that requires mental focus until you know how this medicine affects you. Avoid drinking alcohol while taking this medicine as it can make dizziness worse.
Never support self-medication or recommend your medicine to another person. It is beneficial to have plenty of fluids while taking this medication. Before taking it, you should tell your doctor if you have any kidney and liver diseases. Pregnant or breastfeeding women should also consult their doctor before taking this medicine.
benefits:
In Cough
L Centrizon AM 5mg/75mg Tablet gives relief from cough by loosening thick mucus and making it easier to cough it out. It also makes it easier for air to move in and out of your airways. This reduces the frequency of coughing and makes you feel better. L Centrizon AM 5mg/75mg Tablet also relieves allergy symptoms like watery eyes, sneezing, runny nose or throat irritation. Along with medications, drink enough lukewarm water and gargle with warm salt water to ease the symptoms.
sideEffects:
Most side effects do not require any medical attention and disappear as your body adjusts to the medicine. Consult your doctor if they persist or if you’re worried about them

Upset stomach

Headache

Sleepiness
Allergic reaction

faqs:
What is L Centrizon AM 5mg/75mg Tablet used for?
L Centrizon AM 5mg/75mg Tablet is used to treat conditions like sinusitis, allergic rhinitis, and similar respiratory issues. It helps reduce allergy symptoms like sneezing, runny nose, nasal congestion, and thins mucus to improve breathing.
Can L Centrizon AM 5mg/75mg Tablet cause serious side effects?
Although they are rare, some people may experience serious side effects of L Centrizon AM 5mg/75mg Tablet, such as severe allergic reactions, rash, vomiting, diarrhea, or difficulty breathing. Seek immediate medical help if you notice any unusual or serious symptoms after taking the tablet.
Who should avoid taking L Centrizon AM 5mg/75mg Tablet?
Individuals should not take L Centrizon AM 5mg/75mg Tablet if they have a history of allergy to any of its ingredients or if they have severe kidney problems. It is also not recommended for people with end-stage renal disease.
Is it safe to take L Centrizon AM 5mg/75mg Tablet during pregnancy or while breastfeeding?
L Centrizon AM 5mg/75mg Tablet is not recommended during pregnancy or while breastfeeding unless clearly advised by your doctor. Always inform your doctor if you are pregnant or nursing before starting L Centrizon AM 5mg/75mg Tablet.
Can L Centrizon AM 5mg/75mg Tablet affect my ability to drive or use machines?
L Centrizon AM 5mg/75mg Tablet may cause drowsiness or dizziness in some people. You should avoid driving or operating heavy machinery until you know how the medication affects you.
Can children or elderly people take L Centrizon AM 5mg/75mg Tablet?
Children should take L Centrizon AM 5mg/75mg Tablet only if prescribed by a doctor. Elderly individuals with normal kidney function can take the usual dose, but dosage adjustments may be needed if they have kidney problems.

title: L Cet AB Tablet
uses:
L Cet AB Tablet is taken with or without food in a dose and duration as advised by the doctor. The dose you are given will depend on your condition and how you respond to the medicine. You should keep taking this medicine for as long as your doctor recommends. If you stop treatment too early your symptoms may come back and your condition may worsen. Let your doctor know about all other medications you are taking as some may affect, or be affected by this medicine.
The most common side effects are stomach upset, dryness in mouth, headache, fatigue, and allergic reaction. Most of these are temporary and usually resolve with time. Contact your doctor straight away if you are at all concerned about any of these side effects. This medicine can also cause dizziness and sleepiness, so do not drive or do anything that requires mental focus until you know how this medicine affects you. Avoid drinking alcohol while taking this medicine as it can make dizziness worse.
Never support self-medication or recommend your medicine to another person. It is beneficial to have plenty of fluids while taking this medication. Before taking it, you should tell your doctor if you have any kidney and liver diseases. Pregnant or breastfeeding women should also consult their doctor before taking this medicine.
benefits:
In Cough
L Cet AB Tablet gives relief from cough by loosening thick mucus and making it easier to cough it out. It also makes it easier for air to move in and out of your airways. This reduces the frequency of coughing and makes you feel better. L Cet AB Tablet also relieves allergy symptoms like watery eyes, sneezing, runny nose or throat irritation. Along with medications, drink enough lukewarm water and gargle with warm salt water to ease the symptoms.

faqs:
What is L Cet AB Tablet used for?
L Cet AB Tablet is used to treat conditions like sinusitis, allergic rhinitis, and similar respiratory issues. It helps reduce allergy symptoms like sneezing, runny nose, nasal congestion, and thins mucus to improve breathing.
Can L Cet AB Tablet cause serious side effects?
Although they are rare, some people may experience serious side effects of L Cet AB Tablet, such as severe allergic reactions, rash, vomiting, diarrhea, or difficulty breathing. Seek immediate medical help if you notice any unusual or serious symptoms after taking the tablet.
Who should avoid taking L Cet AB Tablet?
Individuals should not take L Cet AB Tablet if they have a history of allergy to any of its ingredients or if they have severe kidney problems. It is also not recommended for people with end-stage renal disease.
Is it safe to take L Cet AB Tablet during pregnancy or while breastfeeding?
L Cet AB Tablet is not recommended during pregnancy or while breastfeeding unless clearly advised by your doctor. Always inform your doctor if you are pregnant or nursing before starting L Cet AB Tablet.
Can L Cet AB Tablet affect my ability to drive or use machines?
L Cet AB Tablet may cause drowsiness or dizziness in some people. You should avoid driving or operating heavy machinery until you know how the medication affects you.
Can children or elderly people take L Cet AB Tablet?
Children should take L Cet AB Tablet only if prescribed by a doctor. Elderly individuals with normal kidney function can take the usual dose, but dosage adjustments may be needed if they have kidney problems.

My child is restless and unable to sleep properly at night. Can I give L Cetiriz 2.5mg Syrup?

Can other medicines be given at the same time as L Cetiriz 2.5mg Syrup?
L Cetiriz 2.5mg Syrup can sometimes interact with other medicines or substances. Tell your doctor about any other medicines your child is taking before starting L Cetiriz 2.5mg Syrup. Also, check with your child’s doctor before giving any medicine to your child.
How much L Cetiriz 2.5mg Syrup should I give to my child?

What if I give too much of L Cetiriz 2.5mg Syrup by mistake?
Although L Cetiriz 2.5mg Syrup is relatively safe to use in children yet an excessive amount may cause some serious side effects such as seizures, hallucinations, rapid heart rate, irritability, slow breathing, and coma.
How should L Cetiriz 2.5mg Syrup be stored?
Store L Cetiriz 2.5mg Syrup at room temperature, in a dry place, away from direct heat and light. Keep all medicines out of the reach and sight of children to avoid any accidental intake.

title: L Cetnid M 5mg/10mg Tablet
uses:
L Cetnid M 5mg/10mg Tablet is taken with or without food in a dose and duration as advised by the doctor. The dose you are given will depend on your condition and how you respond to the medicine. You should keep taking this medicine for as long as your doctor recommends. If you stop treatment too early, your symptoms may come back and your condition may worsen. Let your healthcare team know about all other medications you are taking, as some may affect, or be affected by, this medicine.
The most common side effects are nausea, diarrhea, vomiting, dryness in the mouth, headache, skin rash, flu-like symptoms, and fatigue. Most of these are temporary and usually resolve with time. Contact your doctor straight away if you are at all concerned about any of these side effects. This medicine may cause dizziness and sleepiness, so do not drive or do anything that requires mental focus until you know how this medicine affects you. Avoid drinking alcohol while taking this medicine, as it can worsen your sleepiness.
Never support self-medication or recommend your medicine to another person. It is beneficial to have plenty of fluids while taking this medication. Before you start taking this medicine, inform your doctor about pregnancy, breastfeeding, or if you have any liver or kidney issues. Additionally, let your doctor also know about all the other medicines you are taking to avoid potential interactions.
benefits:
In Treatment of Sneezing and runny nose due to allergies
L Cetnid M 5mg/10mg Tablet is a medicine that provides relief from symptoms such as a blocked or runny nose, sneezing, and itchy or watery eyes. This will make it easier for you to go about your daily activities. It rarely has any serious side effects, and you may only need to take it on days you have symptoms. If you are taking it to prevent getting symptoms, you should use it regularly to get the most benefit.
In Treatment of Hay fever
Hay fever, also called allergic rhinitis, causes cold-like signs and symptoms, such as a runny nose, itchy eyes, congestion, sneezing, and sinus pressure. The only difference is that in hay fever, these symptoms are not produced due to a virus but are simply allergic responses of our body to allergens (allergy-causing agents such as pollen). L Cetnid M 5mg/10mg Tablet is used to provide relief from the symptoms of hay fever. It works by blocking the release of the chemical substance responsible for producing such allergy symptoms. L Cetnid M 5mg/10mg Tablet is a safe medicine that helps treat hay fever and makes us feel at ease.

faqs:
What is L Cetnid M 5mg/10mg Tablet?
L Cetnid M 5mg/10mg Tablet is a combination of two medicines: Montelukast and Levocetirizine. Levocetirizine is an antiallergic which helps to relieve allergy symptoms like a runny nose, sneezing, watery eyes, and cough. It works by lowering chemicals in the body that cause allergy symptoms. Montelukast works by blocking another chemical messenger (leukotriene) and reducing inflammation (swelling) in the airways and nose. This further helps to relieve the symptoms.
Can the use of L Cetnid M 5mg/10mg Tablet cause drowsiness or sleepiness?
Yes, the most common side effect of L Cetnid M 5mg/10mg Tablet is sleepiness. Do not drive, operate heavy machinery, or engage in other activities that need your full attention unless your doctor says that you may do so. Do not drink alcohol or take other central nervous system depressants, such as cough and cold medicines. Also, avoid taking certain pain relief medicines and medicines that help you sleep, as they can lead to severe drowsiness or worsen it, causing falls or accidents.
Can L Cetnid M 5mg/10mg Tablet be stopped when allergy symptoms are relieved?
No, L Cetnid M 5mg/10mg Tablet should be continued as advised by the doctor. If you experience any side effects of this medicine or the symptoms of allergy worsen, consult the doctor for re-evaluation.
Can the use of L Cetnid M 5mg/10mg Tablet cause dry mouth?
Yes, the use of L Cetnid M 5mg/10mg Tablet can cause dry mouth. If you experience dry mouth, drink plenty of water. Take regular sips during the day and keep some water by your bed at night. You may use lip balm if your lips are also dry.
Can I drink alcohol while taking L Cetnid M 5mg/10mg Tablet?
No, do not take alcohol while taking L Cetnid M 5mg/10mg Tablet. Drinking alcohol will increase the severity of drowsiness/sleepiness caused by L Cetnid M 5mg/10mg Tablet.
Will L Cetnid M 5mg/10mg Tablet be more effective if taken in higher doses?
No, taking a higher dose of this medicine than recommended will not make it more effective. Consuming higher than the recommended dose of L Cetnid M 5mg/10mg Tablet can cause increased side effects. If the symptoms are getting severe, please consult the doctor for re-evaluation.
What are the instructions for the storage and disposal of L Cetnid M 5mg/10mg Tablet?
Keep this medicine in the container or the pack it came in, tightly closed. Store it according to the instructions mentioned on the pack or label. Dispose of the unused medicine. Make sure it is not consumed by pets, children, or other people.

faqs:
My child has a persistent cough along with allergic symptoms. Can I give cough and allergy medicine together?
No. Do not mix cough and allergy medicines because they usually both contain similar ingredients. This may result in double dosing of the active ingredients, thereby causing serious side effects.
Can I decrease the dose of L Cetra Kid 2.5mg/5mg Tablet by myself if my child starts to feel better?
No, adhere to the dose as prescribed by your child’s doctor. Do not increase or decrease the dose by yourself as it can impact your child’s health. While increasing the dose may cause unwanted effects like sedation and depression, decreasing the dose or stopping it suddenly can result in rebound reversal of all symptoms.
How should L Cetra Kid 2.5mg/5mg Tablet be stored?
L Cetra Kid 2.5mg/5mg Tablet should be stored at room temperature in a dry place, away from direct heat and light. Also, keep all medicines out of the reach and sight of children to avoid any accidental intake.
Can L Cetra Kid 2.5mg/5mg Tablet make my child sleepy?
L Cetra Kid 2.5mg/5mg Tablet causes mild drowsiness which can make your child sleepy. However, never give this medicine to your child to induce sleep. Forced sleep could mask any underlying sleep disorder like insomnia.
My child is an athlete and has to participate in a sports event in the next two days. Can I start the course of L Cetra Kid 2.5mg/5mg Tablet?
No, don’t start L Cetra Kid 2.5mg/5mg Tablet without speaking to your child’s doctor. Moreover, L Cetra Kid 2.5mg/5mg Tablet can hamper your child’s performance as it may cause mild sedation, dizziness, and sleepiness. So, it’s best to reach out to the doctor first.
Can I stop the medicine by myself?
No, all symptoms may reappear on sudden withdrawal of L Cetra Kid 2.5mg/5mg Tablet usually if taken for a long-term. It is advised to stop this medicine gradually under the guidance of your child’s doctor.
My child is suffering from a mood disorder. Is it safe to give L Cetra Kid 2.5mg/5mg Tablet to my child?
Some studies show that L Cetra Kid 2.5mg/5mg Tablet can cause mood disorders, hallucinations, depression, anxiety, suicidal thoughts, shakiness, and trouble controlling body movements. Therefore, consult your child’s doctor before giving any medicine to your child.
Can I use L Cetra Kid 2.5mg/5mg Tablet for treating acute asthma attacks in my child?
L Cetra Kid 2.5mg/5mg Tablet should only be used to prevent asthma attacks. It should not be used to stop an attack that has already started. Use your child’s reliever medicine to help with an attack that has already started.

title: L Cetra Tablet
uses:
L Cetra Tablet can be taken with or without food. The dose required by you may vary depending on what you are taking it for. This medicine is usually taken in the evening, but follow the advice of your doctor on how to take it. You may need this medicine only on days you have symptoms, but if you are taking it to prevent the symptoms then you should take it regularly. If you miss doses or stop taking it earlier than advised, your symptoms may come back.
Common side effects include somnolence (sleepiness), dry mouth, fatigue, fever, cough, nasopharyngitis, and nosebleed. These are usually mild and go away after a couple of days as your body adjusts to it. Consult your doctor if any of the side effects persist or worry you.
Before taking it, tell your doctor if you have any kidney problems or epilepsy (seizures). Your dose may need to be modified or this medicine may not suit you. Some other medicines can interact with this medicine so let your healthcare team know what else you are taking. You should also talk to your doctor before using this medicine if you are pregnant or breastfeeding, although it is not thought to be harmful.
benefits:

L Cetra Tablet provides relief from symptoms such as blocked or runny nose, sneezing, and itchy or watery eyes. This will make it easier for you to go about your daily activities. It can also give relief from allergic reactions after insect bites and symptoms of hives and eczema such as rash, swelling, itching, and irritation.  This will improve the appearance of your skin and you may find that your mood and self-confidence improve as well. It rarely has any serious side effects and you may only need to take it on days you have symptoms. Moreover, L Cetra Tablet may make you feel less sleepy as compared to other antihistamine medicines. If you are taking it to prevent getting symptoms you should use it regularly to get the most benefit.

faqs:
Is L Cetra Tablet a steroid? What is it used for?
No, L Cetra Tablet is not a steroid. It is an anti-allergic medication which is used to relieve the symptoms of allergy. It relieves runny nose, sneezing and redness, itching and watering of the eyes caused by hay fever or seasonal allergies. It also relieves similar symptoms caused due to allergies to substances, such as dust mites, animal dander and mold. Additionally, it is helpful in treating symptoms of hives, including itching and rash.
Does L Cetra Tablet make you tired and drowsy?
Yes, L Cetra Tablet can make you feel tired, sleepy and weak. If you have these symptoms, avoid driving or operating heavy machinery. Consult your doctor if not sure.
How long does it take for L Cetra Tablet to work?
L Cetra Tablet starts working and showing improvement within an hour of taking it. However, it may take a little longer to notice the full benefits.
Can I take L Cetra Tablet and Fexofenadine together?
Sometimes the doctor may advise you to take two different antihistamines together if you are being treated for a severe itchy rash. If you are taking L Cetra Tablet during the daytime, your doctor may prescribe another antihistamine for the night which causes sleepiness, especially if the itch makes it difficult for you to sleep.
Is it safe to take L Cetra Tablet for a long time?
L Cetra Tablet is safe if used as prescribed by your doctor. Moreover, it is unlikely to harm you if you take it for a long time. But, it is best to take L Cetra Tablet for only as long as you need it.
For how long should I continue L Cetra Tablet?
The duration for which the medicine needs to be taken depends on the problem being treated. For instance, if you are taking it for an insect bite, you may need it for a day or two. While, if you are taking it to prevent symptoms of chronic allergic rhinitis (inflammation of nose) or chronic urticaria, you may need to take L Cetra Tablet for a longer time. Talk to your doctor if you are unsure about the duration of using L Cetra Tablet

title: L Cetraxyn M 5mg/10mg Tablet
uses:
L Cetraxyn M 5mg/10mg Tablet is taken with or without food in a dose and duration as advised by the doctor. The dose you are given will depend on your condition and how you respond to the medicine. You should keep taking this medicine for as long as your doctor recommends. If you stop treatment too early, your symptoms may come back and your condition may worsen. Let your healthcare team know about all other medications you are taking, as some may affect, or be affected by, this medicine.
The most common side effects are nausea, diarrhea, vomiting, dryness in the mouth, headache, skin rash, flu-like symptoms, and fatigue. Most of these are temporary and usually resolve with time. Contact your doctor straight away if you are at all concerned about any of these side effects. This medicine may cause dizziness and sleepiness, so do not drive or do anything that requires mental focus until you know how this medicine affects you. Avoid drinking alcohol while taking this medicine, as it can worsen your sleepiness.
Never support self-medication or recommend your medicine to another person. It is beneficial to have plenty of fluids while taking this medication. Before you start taking this medicine, inform your doctor about pregnancy, breastfeeding, or if you have any liver or kidney issues. Additionally, let your doctor also know about all the other medicines you are taking to avoid potential interactions.
benefits:
In Treatment of Sneezing and runny nose due to allergies
L Cetraxyn M 5mg/10mg Tablet is a medicine that provides relief from symptoms such as a blocked or runny nose, sneezing, and itchy or watery eyes. This will make it easier for you to go about your daily activities. It rarely has any serious side effects, and you may only need to take it on days you have symptoms. If you are taking it to prevent getting symptoms, you should use it regularly to get the most benefit.
In Treatment of Hay fever
Hay fever, also called allergic rhinitis, causes cold-like signs and symptoms, such as a runny nose, itchy eyes, congestion, sneezing, and sinus pressure. The only difference is that in hay fever, these symptoms are not produced due to a virus but are simply allergic responses of our body to allergens (allergy-causing agents such as pollen). L Cetraxyn M 5mg/10mg Tablet is used to provide relief from the symptoms of hay fever. It works by blocking the release of the chemical substance responsible for producing such allergy symptoms. L Cetraxyn M 5mg/10mg Tablet is a safe medicine that helps treat hay fever and makes us feel at ease.

faqs:
What is L Cetraxyn M 5mg/10mg Tablet?
L Cetraxyn M 5mg/10mg Tablet is a combination of two medicines: Montelukast and Levocetirizine. Levocetirizine is an antiallergic which helps to relieve allergy symptoms like a runny nose, sneezing, watery eyes, and cough. It works by lowering chemicals in the body that cause allergy symptoms. Montelukast works by blocking another chemical messenger (leukotriene) and reducing inflammation (swelling) in the airways and nose. This further helps to relieve the symptoms.
Can the use of L Cetraxyn M 5mg/10mg Tablet cause drowsiness or sleepiness?
Yes, the most common side effect of L Cetraxyn M 5mg/10mg Tablet is sleepiness. Do not drive, operate heavy machinery, or engage in other activities that need your full attention unless your doctor says that you may do so. Do not drink alcohol or take other central nervous system depressants, such as cough and cold medicines. Also, avoid taking certain pain relief medicines and medicines that help you sleep, as they can lead to severe drowsiness or worsen it, causing falls or accidents.
Can L Cetraxyn M 5mg/10mg Tablet be stopped when allergy symptoms are relieved?
No, L Cetraxyn M 5mg/10mg Tablet should be continued as advised by the doctor. If you experience any side effects of this medicine or the symptoms of allergy worsen, consult the doctor for re-evaluation.
Can the use of L Cetraxyn M 5mg/10mg Tablet cause dry mouth?
Yes, the use of L Cetraxyn M 5mg/10mg Tablet can cause dry mouth. If you experience dry mouth, drink plenty of water. Take regular sips during the day and keep some water by your bed at night. You may use lip balm if your lips are also dry.
Can I drink alcohol while taking L Cetraxyn M 5mg/10mg Tablet?
No, do not take alcohol while taking L Cetraxyn M 5mg/10mg Tablet. Drinking alcohol will increase the severity of drowsiness/sleepiness caused by L Cetraxyn M 5mg/10mg Tablet.
Will L Cetraxyn M 5mg/10mg Tablet be more effective if taken in higher doses?
No, taking a higher dose of this medicine than recommended will not make it more effective. Consuming higher than the recommended dose of L Cetraxyn M 5mg/10mg Tablet can cause increased side effects. If the symptoms are getting severe, please consult the doctor for re-evaluation.
What are the instructions for the storage and disposal of L Cetraxyn M 5mg/10mg Tablet?
Keep this medicine in the container or the pack it came in, tightly closed. Store it according to the instructions mentioned on the pack or label. Dispose of the unused medicine. Make sure it is not consumed by pets, children, or other people.

uses:

Benefits of L Cetraxyn M Oral Suspension
In Treatment of Allergic skin conditions
L Cetraxyn M Oral Suspension is effective in treating allergic skin conditions with inflammation and itching. It reduces the actions of chemicals in the body that cause inflammation of the skin. When used correctly it is a safe and effective treatment. It reduces the redness, rash, pain or itchiness caused by your skin’s reaction to an irritant. It thus improves your self-esteem and confidence as your appearance changes. Keep taking it for as long as it is prescribed to get the full benefits.
In Treatment of Sneezing and runny nose due to allergies
L Cetraxyn M Oral Suspension is a combination medicine that provides relief from symptoms such as blocked or runny nose, sneezing and itchy or watery eyes. This will make it easier for you to go about your daily activities. It rarely has any serious side effects and you may only need to take it on days you have symptoms. If you are taking it to prevent getting symptoms you should use it regularly to get the most benefit.
In Treatment of Hay fever
Hay fever, also called allergic rhinitis, causes cold-like signs and symptoms, such as a runny nose, itchy eyes, congestion, sneezing and sinus pressure. The only difference is that in hay fever, these symptoms are not produced due to a virus but are simply allergic responses of our body to allergens (allergy causing agents such as pollen). L Cetraxyn M Oral Suspension is used to provide relief from these symptoms of hay fever. It works by blocking the release of the chemical substance responsible for producing such allergy symptoms. L Cetraxyn M Oral Suspension is a safe medicine which helps treat hay fever and makes us feel at ease.

faqs:
My child has a persistent cough along with allergic symptoms. Can I give cough and allergy medicine together?
No. Do not mix cough and allergy medicines because they usually both contain similar ingredients. This may result in double dosing of the active ingredients, thereby causing serious side effects.
Can I decrease the dose of L Cetraxyn M Oral Suspension by myself if my child starts to feel better?
No, adhere to the dose as prescribed by your child’s doctor. Do not increase or decrease the dose by yourself as it can impact your child’s health. While increasing the dose may cause unwanted effects like sedation and depression, decreasing the dose or stopping it suddenly can result in rebound reversal of all symptoms.
How should L Cetraxyn M Oral Suspension be stored?
L Cetraxyn M Oral Suspension should be stored at room temperature in a dry place, away from direct heat and light. Also, keep all medicines out of the reach and sight of children to avoid any accidental intake.
Can L Cetraxyn M Oral Suspension make my child sleepy?
L Cetraxyn M Oral Suspension causes mild drowsiness which can make your child sleepy. However, never give this medicine to your child to induce sleep. Forced sleep could mask any underlying sleep disorder like insomnia.
My child is an athlete and has to participate in a sports event in the next two days. Can I start the course of L Cetraxyn M Oral Suspension?
No, don’t start L Cetraxyn M Oral Suspension without speaking to your child’s doctor. Moreover, L Cetraxyn M Oral Suspension can hamper your child’s performance as it may cause mild sedation, dizziness, and sleepiness. So, it’s best to reach out to the doctor first.
Can I stop the medicine by myself?
No, all symptoms may reappear on sudden withdrawal of L Cetraxyn M Oral Suspension usually if taken for a long-term. It is advised to stop this medicine gradually under the guidance of your child’s doctor.
My child is suffering from a mood disorder. Is it safe to give L Cetraxyn M Oral Suspension to my child?
Some studies show that L Cetraxyn M Oral Suspension can cause mood disorders, hallucinations, depression, anxiety, suicidal thoughts, shakiness, and trouble controlling body movements. Therefore, consult your child’s doctor before giving any medicine to your child.
Can I use L Cetraxyn M Oral Suspension for treating acute asthma attacks in my child?
L Cetraxyn M Oral Suspension should only be used to prevent asthma attacks. It should not be used to stop an attack that has already started. Use your child’s reliever medicine to help with an attack that has already started.

You may need this medicine only on days you have symptoms, but if you are taking it to prevent the symptoms then you should take it regularly. If you miss doses or stop taking it earlier than advised, your symptoms may come back.

Before taking it, tell your doctor if you have any kidney problems or epilepsy (seizures). Your dose may need to be modified or this medicine may not suit you. You should also talk to your doctor before using this medicine if you are pregnant or breastfeeding, although it is not thought to be harmful.

faqs:
Is L Cetree 5mg Tablet a steroid? What is it used for?
No, L Cetree 5mg Tablet is not a steroid. It is an anti-allergic medication which is used to relieve the symptoms of allergy. It relieves runny nose, sneezing and redness, itching and watering of the eyes caused by hay fever or seasonal allergies. It also relieves similar symptoms caused due to allergies to substances, such as dust mites, animal dander and mold. Additionally, it is helpful in treating symptoms of hives, including itching and rash.
Does L Cetree 5mg Tablet make you tired and drowsy?
Yes, L Cetree 5mg Tablet can make you feel tired, sleepy and weak. If you have these symptoms, avoid driving or operating heavy machinery. Consult your doctor if not sure.
How long does it take for L Cetree 5mg Tablet to work?
L Cetree 5mg Tablet starts working and showing improvement within an hour of taking it. However, it may take a little longer to notice the full benefits.
Can I take L Cetree 5mg Tablet and Fexofenadine together?
Sometimes the doctor may advise you to take two different antihistamines together if you are being treated for a severe itchy rash. If you are taking L Cetree 5mg Tablet during the daytime, your doctor may prescribe another antihistamine for the night which causes sleepiness, especially if the itch makes it difficult for you to sleep.
Is it safe to take L Cetree 5mg Tablet for a long time?
L Cetree 5mg Tablet is safe if used as prescribed by your doctor. Moreover, it is unlikely to harm you if you take it for a long time. But, it is best to take L Cetree 5mg Tablet for only as long as you need it.
For how long should I continue L Cetree 5mg Tablet?
The duration for which the medicine needs to be taken depends on the problem being treated. For instance, if you are taking it for an insect bite, you may need it for a day or two. While, if you are taking it to prevent symptoms of chronic allergic rhinitis (inflammation of nose) or chronic urticaria, you may need to take L Cetree 5mg Tablet for a longer time. Talk to your doctor if you are unsure about the duration of using L Cetree 5mg Tablet

title: L Cetril 5mg Tablet
uses:
L Cetril 5mg Tablet can be taken with or without food. The dose required by you may vary depending on what you are taking it for. This medicine is usually taken in the evening, but follow the advice of your doctor on how to take it. You may need this medicine only on days you have symptoms, but if you are taking it to prevent the symptoms then you should take it regularly. If you miss doses or stop taking it earlier than advised, your symptoms may come back.
Common side effects include somnolence (sleepiness), dry mouth, fatigue, fever, cough, nasopharyngitis, and nosebleed. These are usually mild and go away after a couple of days as your body adjusts to it. Consult your doctor if any of the side effects persist or worry you.
Before taking it, tell your doctor if you have any kidney problems or epilepsy (seizures). Your dose may need to be modified or this medicine may not suit you. Some other medicines can interact with this medicine so let your healthcare team know what else you are taking. You should also talk to your doctor before using this medicine if you are pregnant or breastfeeding, although it is not thought to be harmful.
benefits:
In Treatment of Allergic conditions
L Cetril 5mg Tablet provides relief from symptoms such as blocked or runny nose, sneezing, and itchy or watery eyes. This will make it easier for you to go about your daily activities. It can also give relief from allergic reactions after insect bites and symptoms of hives and eczema such as rash, swelling, itching, and irritation.  This will improve the appearance of your skin and you may find that your mood and self-confidence improve as well. It rarely has any serious side effects and you may only need to take it on days you have symptoms. Moreover, L Cetril 5mg Tablet may make you feel less sleepy as compared to other antihistamine medicines. If you are taking it to prevent getting symptoms you should use it regularly to get the most benefit.

Most side effects do not require any medical attention and disappear as your body adjusts to the medicine. Consult your doctor if they persist or if you’re worried about them

faqs:
Is L Cetril 5mg Tablet a steroid? What is it used for?
No, L Cetril 5mg Tablet is not a steroid. It is an anti-allergic medication which is used to relieve the symptoms of allergy. It relieves runny nose, sneezing and redness, itching and watering of the eyes caused by hay fever or seasonal allergies. It also relieves similar symptoms caused due to allergies to substances, such as dust mites, animal dander and mold. Additionally, it is helpful in treating symptoms of hives, including itching and rash.
Does L Cetril 5mg Tablet make you tired and drowsy?
Yes, L Cetril 5mg Tablet can make you feel tired, sleepy and weak. If you have these symptoms, avoid driving or operating heavy machinery. Consult your doctor if not sure.
How long does it take for L Cetril 5mg Tablet to work?
L Cetril 5mg Tablet starts working and showing improvement within an hour of taking it. However, it may take a little longer to notice the full benefits.
Can I take L Cetril 5mg Tablet and Fexofenadine together?
Sometimes the doctor may advise you to take two different antihistamines together if you are being treated for a severe itchy rash. If you are taking L Cetril 5mg Tablet during the daytime, your doctor may prescribe another antihistamine for the night which causes sleepiness, especially if the itch makes it difficult for you to sleep.
Is it safe to take L Cetril 5mg Tablet for a long time?
L Cetril 5mg Tablet is safe if used as prescribed by your doctor. Moreover, it is unlikely to harm you if you take it for a long time. But, it is best to take L Cetril 5mg Tablet for only as long as you need it.
For how long should I continue L Cetril 5mg Tablet?
The duration for which the medicine needs to be taken depends on the problem being treated. For instance, if you are taking it for an insect bite, you may need it for a day or two. While, if you are taking it to prevent symptoms of chronic allergic rhinitis (inflammation of nose) or chronic urticaria, you may need to take L Cetril 5mg Tablet for a longer time. Talk to your doctor if you are unsure about the duration of using L Cetril 5mg Tablet

title: L Cetrino M 5mg/10mg Tablet
uses:
L Cetrino M 5mg/10mg Tablet is taken with or without food in a dose and duration as advised by the doctor. The dose you are given will depend on your condition and how you respond to the medicine. You should keep taking this medicine for as long as your doctor recommends. If you stop treatment too early, your symptoms may come back and your condition may worsen. Let your healthcare team know about all other medications you are taking, as some may affect, or be affected by, this medicine.
The most common side effects are nausea, diarrhea, vomiting, dryness in the mouth, headache, skin rash, flu-like symptoms, and fatigue. Most of these are temporary and usually resolve with time. Contact your doctor straight away if you are at all concerned about any of these side effects. This medicine may cause dizziness and sleepiness, so do not drive or do anything that requires mental focus until you know how this medicine affects you. Avoid drinking alcohol while taking this medicine, as it can worsen your sleepiness.
Never support self-medication or recommend your medicine to another person. It is beneficial to have plenty of fluids while taking this medication. Before you start taking this medicine, inform your doctor about pregnancy, breastfeeding, or if you have any liver or kidney issues. Additionally, let your doctor also know about all the other medicines you are taking to avoid potential interactions.
benefits:
In Treatment of Sneezing and runny nose due to allergies
L Cetrino M 5mg/10mg Tablet is a medicine that provides relief from symptoms such as a blocked or runny nose, sneezing, and itchy or watery eyes. This will make it easier for you to go about your daily activities. It rarely has any serious side effects, and you may only need to take it on days you have symptoms. If you are taking it to prevent getting symptoms, you should use it regularly to get the most benefit.
In Treatment of Hay fever
Hay fever, also called allergic rhinitis, causes cold-like signs and symptoms, such as a runny nose, itchy eyes, congestion, sneezing, and sinus pressure. The only difference is that in hay fever, these symptoms are not produced due to a virus but are simply allergic responses of our body to allergens (allergy-causing agents such as pollen). L Cetrino M 5mg/10mg Tablet is used to provide relief from the symptoms of hay fever. It works by blocking the release of the chemical substance responsible for producing such allergy symptoms. L Cetrino M 5mg/10mg Tablet is a safe medicine that helps treat hay fever and makes us feel at ease.

faqs:
What is L Cetrino M 5mg/10mg Tablet?
L Cetrino M 5mg/10mg Tablet is a combination of two medicines: Montelukast and Levocetirizine. Levocetirizine is an antiallergic which helps to relieve allergy symptoms like a runny nose, sneezing, watery eyes, and cough. It works by lowering chemicals in the body that cause allergy symptoms. Montelukast works by blocking another chemical messenger (leukotriene) and reducing inflammation (swelling) in the airways and nose. This further helps to relieve the symptoms.
Can the use of L Cetrino M 5mg/10mg Tablet cause drowsiness or sleepiness?
Yes, the most common side effect of L Cetrino M 5mg/10mg Tablet is sleepiness. Do not drive, operate heavy machinery, or engage in other activities that need your full attention unless your doctor says that you may do so. Do not drink alcohol or take other central nervous system depressants, such as cough and cold medicines. Also, avoid taking certain pain relief medicines and medicines that help you sleep, as they can lead to severe drowsiness or worsen it, causing falls or accidents.
Can L Cetrino M 5mg/10mg Tablet be stopped when allergy symptoms are relieved?
No, L Cetrino M 5mg/10mg Tablet should be continued as advised by the doctor. If you experience any side effects of this medicine or the symptoms of allergy worsen, consult the doctor for re-evaluation.
Can the use of L Cetrino M 5mg/10mg Tablet cause dry mouth?
Yes, the use of L Cetrino M 5mg/10mg Tablet can cause dry mouth. If you experience dry mouth, drink plenty of water. Take regular sips during the day and keep some water by your bed at night. You may use lip balm if your lips are also dry.
Can I drink alcohol while taking L Cetrino M 5mg/10mg Tablet?
No, do not take alcohol while taking L Cetrino M 5mg/10mg Tablet. Drinking alcohol will increase the severity of drowsiness/sleepiness caused by L Cetrino M 5mg/10mg Tablet.
Will L Cetrino M 5mg/10mg Tablet be more effective if taken in higher doses?
No, taking a higher dose of this medicine than recommended will not make it more effective. Consuming higher than the recommended dose of L Cetrino M 5mg/10mg Tablet can cause increased side effects. If the symptoms are getting severe, please consult the doctor for re-evaluation.
What are the instructions for the storage and disposal of L Cetrino M 5mg/10mg Tablet?
Keep this medicine in the container or the pack it came in, tightly closed. Store it according to the instructions mentioned on the pack or label. Dispose of the unused medicine. Make sure it is not consumed by pets, children, or other people.

title: L Cetriyl M 5mg/10mg Tablet
uses:
L Cetriyl M 5mg/10mg Tablet is taken with or without food in a dose and duration as advised by the doctor. The dose you are given will depend on your condition and how you respond to the medicine. You should keep taking this medicine for as long as your doctor recommends. If you stop treatment too early, your symptoms may come back and your condition may worsen. Let your healthcare team know about all other medications you are taking, as some may affect, or be affected by, this medicine.
The most common side effects are nausea, diarrhea, vomiting, dryness in the mouth, headache, skin rash, flu-like symptoms, and fatigue. Most of these are temporary and usually resolve with time. Contact your doctor straight away if you are at all concerned about any of these side effects. This medicine may cause dizziness and sleepiness, so do not drive or do anything that requires mental focus until you know how this medicine affects you. Avoid drinking alcohol while taking this medicine, as it can worsen your sleepiness.
Never support self-medication or recommend your medicine to another person. It is beneficial to have plenty of fluids while taking this medication. Before you start taking this medicine, inform your doctor about pregnancy, breastfeeding, or if you have any liver or kidney issues. Additionally, let your doctor also know about all the other medicines you are taking to avoid potential interactions.
benefits:
In Treatment of Sneezing and runny nose due to allergies
L Cetriyl M 5mg/10mg Tablet is a medicine that provides relief from symptoms such as a blocked or runny nose, sneezing, and itchy or watery eyes. This will make it easier for you to go about your daily activities. It rarely has any serious side effects, and you may only need to take it on days you have symptoms. If you are taking it to prevent getting symptoms, you should use it regularly to get the most benefit.
In Treatment of Hay fever
Hay fever, also called allergic rhinitis, causes cold-like signs and symptoms, such as a runny nose, itchy eyes, congestion, sneezing, and sinus pressure. The only difference is that in hay fever, these symptoms are not produced due to a virus but are simply allergic responses of our body to allergens (allergy-causing agents such as pollen). L Cetriyl M 5mg/10mg Tablet is used to provide relief from the symptoms of hay fever. It works by blocking the release of the chemical substance responsible for producing such allergy symptoms. L Cetriyl M 5mg/10mg Tablet is a safe medicine that helps treat hay fever and makes us feel at ease.

faqs:
What is L Cetriyl M 5mg/10mg Tablet?
L Cetriyl M 5mg/10mg Tablet is a combination of two medicines: Montelukast and Levocetirizine. Levocetirizine is an antiallergic which helps to relieve allergy symptoms like a runny nose, sneezing, watery eyes, and cough. It works by lowering chemicals in the body that cause allergy symptoms. Montelukast works by blocking another chemical messenger (leukotriene) and reducing inflammation (swelling) in the airways and nose. This further helps to relieve the symptoms.
Can the use of L Cetriyl M 5mg/10mg Tablet cause drowsiness or sleepiness?
Yes, the most common side effect of L Cetriyl M 5mg/10mg Tablet is sleepiness. Do not drive, operate heavy machinery, or engage in other activities that need your full attention unless your doctor says that you may do so. Do not drink alcohol or take other central nervous system depressants, such as cough and cold medicines. Also, avoid taking certain pain relief medicines and medicines that help you sleep, as they can lead to severe drowsiness or worsen it, causing falls or accidents.
Can L Cetriyl M 5mg/10mg Tablet be stopped when allergy symptoms are relieved?
No, L Cetriyl M 5mg/10mg Tablet should be continued as advised by the doctor. If you experience any side effects of this medicine or the symptoms of allergy worsen, consult the doctor for re-evaluation.
Can the use of L Cetriyl M 5mg/10mg Tablet cause dry mouth?
Yes, the use of L Cetriyl M 5mg/10mg Tablet can cause dry mouth. If you experience dry mouth, drink plenty of water. Take regular sips during the day and keep some water by your bed at night. You may use lip balm if your lips are also dry.
Can I drink alcohol while taking L Cetriyl M 5mg/10mg Tablet?
No, do not take alcohol while taking L Cetriyl M 5mg/10mg Tablet. Drinking alcohol will increase the severity of drowsiness/sleepiness caused by L Cetriyl M 5mg/10mg Tablet.
Will L Cetriyl M 5mg/10mg Tablet be more effective if taken in higher doses?
No, taking a higher dose of this medicine than recommended will not make it more effective. Consuming higher than the recommended dose of L Cetriyl M 5mg/10mg Tablet can cause increased side effects. If the symptoms are getting severe, please consult the doctor for re-evaluation.
What are the instructions for the storage and disposal of L Cetriyl M 5mg/10mg Tablet?
Keep this medicine in the container or the pack it came in, tightly closed. Store it according to the instructions mentioned on the pack or label. Dispose of the unused medicine. Make sure it is not consumed by pets, children, or other people.

faqs:
Is L Cezet 5mg Tablet a steroid? What is it used for?
No, L Cezet 5mg Tablet is not a steroid. It is an anti-allergic medication which is used to relieve the symptoms of allergy. It relieves runny nose, sneezing and redness, itching and watering of the eyes caused by hay fever or seasonal allergies. It also relieves similar symptoms caused due to allergies to substances, such as dust mites, animal dander and mold. Additionally, it is helpful in treating symptoms of hives, including itching and rash.
Does L Cezet 5mg Tablet make you tired and drowsy?
Yes, L Cezet 5mg Tablet can make you feel tired, sleepy and weak. If you have these symptoms, avoid driving or operating heavy machinery. Consult your doctor if not sure.
How long does it take for L Cezet 5mg Tablet to work?
L Cezet 5mg Tablet starts working and showing improvement within an hour of taking it. However, it may take a little longer to notice the full benefits.
Can I take L Cezet 5mg Tablet and Fexofenadine together?
Sometimes the doctor may advise you to take two different antihistamines together if you are being treated for a severe itchy rash. If you are taking L Cezet 5mg Tablet during the daytime, your doctor may prescribe another antihistamine for the night which causes sleepiness, especially if the itch makes it difficult for you to sleep.
Is it safe to take L Cezet 5mg Tablet for a long time?
L Cezet 5mg Tablet is safe if used as prescribed by your doctor. Moreover, it is unlikely to harm you if you take it for a long time. But, it is best to take L Cezet 5mg Tablet for only as long as you need it.
For how long should I continue L Cezet 5mg Tablet?
The duration for which the medicine needs to be taken depends on the problem being treated. For instance, if you are taking it for an insect bite, you may need it for a day or two. While, if you are taking it to prevent symptoms of chronic allergic rhinitis (inflammation of nose) or chronic urticaria, you may need to take L Cezet 5mg Tablet for a longer time. Talk to your doctor if you are unsure about the duration of using L Cezet 5mg Tablet

title: L Cid Junior 30mg Tablet
uses:
L Cid Junior 30mg Tablet is also used to prevent stomach ulcers and acidity. This medicine should be taken one hour before a meal. The dose and duration of the treatment will depend on your underlying condition and how you respond to the medicine. You should keep on taking it as prescribed, even if your symptoms disappear quickly. You can increase the efficiency of the treatment by eating smaller meals more often and avoiding caffeinated drinks (like tea and coffee) and spicy or fatty foods.
The most common side effects of this medicine include nausea, abdominal pain, constipation, and diarrhea. These symptoms are generally mild, but if they bother you or do not go away, consult your doctor. Long-term use of this medicine may increase the risk of side effects. For instance, using this medicine for more than one year may increase your risk of bone fractures, especially with higher doses. Talk to your doctor about ways to prevent bone loss (osteoporosis), such as taking calcium and vitamin D supplements.
Before taking L Cid Junior 30mg Tablet, you need to tell your doctor if you have severe liver problems or are taking medicines for HIV. Also, if you have ever had an allergic reaction to similar medicines in the past or suffer from bone loss (osteoporosis). Pregnant or breastfeeding women should also consult their doctor before taking it. Prolonged use of painkillers increases the risk of peptic ulcers.
benefits:
In Acidity
Acidity occurs when the stomach produces excess acid, leading to a burning sensation in the chest or upper abdomen, often after meals or while lying down. This can cause discomfort, bloating, and interfere with daily life. L Cid Junior 30mg Tablet helps reduce the amount of acid in the stomach, relieving the burning sensation and discomfort. It improves digestion and allows individuals to eat and rest more comfortably, restoring daily comfort and well-being.
In Gastroesophageal reflux disease (Acid reflux)
Gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD), also known as acid reflux, is a chronic condition where stomach acid frequently flows back into the food pipe, causing heartburn, chest discomfort, and irritation in the throat. If untreated, it can lead to long-term damage to the food pipe lining. L Cid Junior 30mg Tablet helps control acid levels, reduces the frequency of reflux episodes, and eases associated symptoms. This leads to better sleep, less discomfort after meals, and an overall improvement in quality of life.
In Peptic ulcer disease
Peptic ulcer disease involves the formation of painful sores in the lining of the stomach or upper intestine, often caused by excess acid or infection. These ulcers can lead to stomach pain, nausea, and even internal bleeding if not managed properly. L Cid Junior 30mg Tablet aids in healing these ulcers by lowering stomach acid levels, promoting faster recovery, and preventing recurrence. This helps reduce pain, supports better digestion, and allows individuals to return to normal eating habits without fear of discomfort.
